authors: Kayli Plotner Patrick Ferrucci a PhD Student in Journalism Studies
raw_title: The Harming and the Helping: Perceived Organizational Effects on Mental Health in the Newsroom
title_en: The Harming and the Helping: Perceived Organizational Effects on Mental Health in the Newsroom
title_zh: 伤害与帮助：新闻编辑室中组织对心理健康的影响感知
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了新闻编辑室的组织环境如何影响记者的心理健康，包括可能造成伤害的因素和提供帮助的方面。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how the organizational environment in newsrooms affects journalists' mental health, including factors that may cause harm and aspects that provide support.
research_direction_zh: 媒体组织心理学与新闻从业者职业健康研究
research_direction_en: Media organizational psychology and occupational health of journalists
